title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude was used with the Williams F1 team to visualize driver and team decision-making under race pressure. The resulting "Pattern of Thought" visualizations were integrated into helmets, race suits, and garage designs for the Monaco Grand Prix.
